subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the All-Knowing unto them that have quaffed the Kawthar of divine knowledge in the Days of the All-Merciful and have turned toward the Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله العلیم للذین شربوا کوثر العرفان فی ایام الرحمن و اقبلوا الی الافق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God
